name: User
description: This object represents a Telegram user or bot.

rows.description: Unique identifier for this user or bot. This number may have more than 32 significant bits and some programming languages may have difficulty/silent defects in interpreting it. But it has at most 52 significant bits, so a 64-bit integer or double-precision float type are safe for storing this identifier.
True , if this user is a bot
Optional . User's or bot's last name
Optional . IETF language tag of the user's language
Optional . True , if this user is a Telegram Premium user
Optional . True , if this user added the bot to the attachment menu
Optional . True , if the bot can be invited to groups. Returned only in getMe .
Optional . True , if privacy mode is disabled for the bot. Returned only in getMe .
Optional . True , if the bot supports inline queries. Returned only in getMe .
Optional . True , if the bot can be connected to a Telegram Business account to receive its messages. Returned only in getMe .
Optional . True , if the bot has a main Web App. Returned only in getMe .
Optional . True , if the bot has forum topic mode enabled in private chats. Returned only in getMe .
Optional . True , if the bot allows users to create and delete topics in private chats. Returned only in getMe .
